reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1084216927848101404/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2xWdVdHUXlOazUyVnpCTWQxQldUMWh5V1dwSWNuYxAB

reviews.comment:
No te tiran los precios de nada, le preguntas a la que atiende y se ofende. La vieja canosa fue la UNICA persona en todo el sur en atenderme para el orto, seguro es porteña

(Translated by Google)
They don't tell you the prices for anything; you ask the woman behind the counter and she gets offended. That old gray-haired woman was the ONLY person in the entire south who treated me terribly; she's probably from Buenos Aires.

reviewReply.comment: Hola Juan, mil disculpas por el mal momento, estamos trabajando para poder tener los precios mas visibles y accesibles para todos
